name: Generic Story Engine
description:
An all-purpose bot perfect for any roleplay!

Features multiple scripts, as well as advanced storytelling and prose writing abilities!

I noticed that there didn't seem to be much in the way of generic, all-purpose bots that could be used for any possible type of roleplay, so I decided to make one! It doesn't matter if it's with a single character, multiple characters, a sweeping sci-fi saga on the scale of Star Wars, a backstabbing political drama to make even Game of Thrones look tame, a cozy slice-of-life anime, or even an epic fantasy adventure to rival that of Lord of the Rings (or your Dungeons and Dragons campaign!), this bot can do it!

This bot is programmed to focus on creating strong narratives and writing high-quality prose. Because of the generic nature of the bot, it does not include information on specific settings/fandoms; for example, if you wanted to do a Pokemon roleplay, you are relying on what your LLM -- Deepseek, Gemini, Claude, GPT, etc. -- knows about Pokemon. For popular franchises -- DC Comics, Marvel, Harry Potter, etc. -- and their associated characters -- Batman, Superman, Wonder Woman, Supergirl, Captain America, Iron Man, Thor, Black Widow, Wanda, Spider-Man, Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, etc. -- most LLMs are going to have sufficient knowledge of the setting, including how to portray characters; as the franchise becomes less popular and especially more recent -- don't expect your LLM to know anything about Stranger Things season 5, for example -- this ability will degrade, meaning that it will be up to you to provide details on the setting and characters.
creator: That'sTotallyWizard
